---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature for the Sploosh language, stdlib, or tooling
title: "[Feature] "
labels: feature, needs-triage
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A concise description of the feature you'd like.

## Motivation

Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Syntax / Behavior

Show how the feature would look in Sploosh code:

```sploosh

```

## Spec Section

Which section(s) of the [Language Spec](docs/spec-plans/LANGUAGE_SPEC.md) does this relate to? (e.g., "Section 8 - Concurrency")

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider? Why is this proposal better?

## Build Targets Affected

- [ ] Native (LLVM)
- [ ] WASM
- [ ] EVM
- [ ] SVM
- [ ] All targets
